p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: repo_syntax_actionList, repo_syntax_sessionWorkspacePicker, repo_structure_actionWidget, repo_imports_resolve. CI commands discovered: package.json has test, compile, check-cyclic-dependencies, hygiene, valid-layers-check targets. Node_modules not installed in environment, so used Node.js file structure checks instead of full tsc compilation. All p2p tests verified passing on base commit ee6bfc559a9089feb8b73962fd4fb5a306821ef4.

validate.notes: Fixed test_workspace_picker_provider_label_moved_to_tooltip regex. The test was searching for 'workspacePicker.browse' and only checking context AFTER it, but 'new SubmenuAction(' appears BEFORE that string. Updated test to find 'new SubmenuAction' first, then look for the one containing 'workspacePicker.browse' within its context. All 4 checks now pass: Docker build, NOP test (reward=0), Gold test (reward=1), Rubric judge (ICR=1.0).
